---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new template, tool integration, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of what feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the benefit it would provide.

**Example:**
- *What are you trying to accomplish?*
- *Why is this important?*
- *How would this feature improve the project?*

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include examples if applicable.

## Possible Implementation

If you have ideas for how to implement this feature, please describe them here. (Optional)

## Related Templates or Examples

Are there existing templates or examples that are related to this feature request?

- Link to related documentation or templates
- Reference similar features in other projects

## Domain or Use Case

If this is a domain-specific feature, please specify:
- **Domain**: (e.g., Healthcare, Fintech, Logistics, IoT, E-Commerce)
- **Industry Context**: Any relevant background about how this would be used

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical (blocks my work)
- [ ] High (would improve productivity significantly)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (interesting future enhancement)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples that would help explain this feature request.

---

**Note:** This project welcomes feature requests for:
- New domain-specific VDM-SL templates
- Orchestration tool integrations (Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD)
- Tool improvements (IDE extensions, linters, verification tools)
- Documentation enhancements
- Translation requests
- New examples or case studies
